title: Falcon - Unpair Headset from Charge Stand
scenario: Unpairing headset from Charge Stand via Clear Trusted Device List does not remove Charge Stand info from Software Update screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone.
Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected headset to open Device Settings.
Tap 'Clear' next to 'Clear Trusted Device List'.
Verify the headset disconnects from the app.
Remove the headset from the app's device list (if still shown).
Go to the phone's system Bluetooth settings and forget/unpair the headset.
Re-pair the headset with the phone via Bluetooth settings.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and complete the pairing/reconnection flow.
Verify the headset is properly paired and connected in the app.
Navigate to Device Settings → Software Update.
Observe the Software Update screen for any information about the Charge Stand.
expected: After unpairing and re-pairing, the headset is properly connected. In Device Settings → Software Update, no information about the Charge Stand appears.
